interactions.control: Workspace profile selector (legacy blueprint compatibility id; no dish UI is rendered)
interactions.result: Switch the authorized Everyday/Developer and Personal/Team composition while preserving durable entity identity
interactions.error: Keep the current valid profile and never grant authority from presentation state

interactions.result: Store the pending work-style choice and continue
interactions.error: Keep focus on the current step and announce that a choice is required

interactions.control: Just me or My team radio card
interactions.result: Store presentation scope without granting membership or permissions
Persist Local mode and continue to the loopback workspace
interactions.error: Explain that Corvus could not start locally and offer Retry

interactions.result: Open the truthful Cloud Preview boundary without starting payment or provisioning
Begin server-owned OIDC only when the auth capability is advertised
interactions.error: Show a recoverable session error without exposing tokens

interactions.result: Return to the runtime choice with Local selected
Recompose navigation and copy while preserving selected durable entity IDs
interactions.error: Keep the current valid profile and announce invalid stored preferences

interactions.result: Open an authorized route and move focus to its heading
interactions.error: Open an explanatory access page for a forbidden direct route

interactions.result: Open a context drawer containing remaining authorized routes
interactions.error: Keep the four primary routes usable

interactions.result: Show contextual detail in a desktop pane or semantic mobile dialog
interactions.error: Keep selection visible in the main surface

interactions.result: Close detail and restore focus to its trigger
interactions.error: Keep the inspector open with focus contained

interactions.result: Retry the current runtime connection without duplicating a provision operation
interactions.error: Retain the last good data and announce offline state

interactions.result: Return to the three choices without deleting or migrating data
Consume the fragment-only desktop pairing value and create a signed local session
interactions.error: Remove the fragment, never render or log the value, and offer a new pairing attempt

interactions.result: Remain disabled until durable queue capability is true
interactions.error: State that editing is unavailable until connection returns
